meta.title: MAIB · Renan Mocelin
meta.description: Renan Mocelin's personal brand and the MAIB presence: AI, automation, Claude Code and development.

blog.description: Technical notes on AI, Claude Code, and what I learn building MAIB.

about.lead: AI engineer. I take language models and get them running in production, outside the demo: deterministic LLM programming, RAG, automation that has to work when it counts.
about.p2: I run MAIB, AI consulting and automation. I'm currently an AI engineer at Freedom.AI and did an AI residency at SENAI/SC.
about.p3: I won the Airbus Prize at ActInSpace 2026 with the IGNITE team, at the world final in Bordeaux, representing Brazil. And 2nd at AKCIT 2025. Here I write what I'm learning as I build.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.body: AI consulting and automation through MAIB. To talk about a project, write to me.

about.title: About
about.lead: AI engineer. I put language models into production and keep them working outside the demo.

bio.p1: I run MAIB, AI consulting and automation. My work is taking LLMs from prototype to real production: deterministic model programming, RAG, automation that holds up in the real world.
bio.p2: I'm currently an AI engineer at Freedom.AI and did an AI residency at SENAI/SC. MAIB is where this becomes a service for people who need the result, not the demo.
bio.p3: Here I write what I learn building: Claude Code, LLM programming, what breaks in production and how I fix it.

items.description: To me, every detail is evidence. Only what holds on its own ships. If it just looks ready, I don't count it as ready.
I speak the language of people who build, without watering it down. Engineering doesn't need marketing on top.
I like testing what's ahead of the curve, always measuring the result. It's calculated risk, with method.

journey.heading: Journey
journey.body: Most recent: I won the Airbus Prize at ActInSpace 2026 with the IGNITE team, at the world final in Bordeaux, and came 2nd at AKCIT 2025. Along the way, an AI residency at SENAI/SC, and today I'm an AI engineer at Freedom.AI, while running MAIB.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.body: To talk about an AI project through MAIB, write to me. Email and LinkedIn are the fastest way.

experience.lead: Where I've worked, what I studied, and the tools I use to put AI into production.

projects.title: Projects
projects.lead: A selection of what I've built: products, hackathon projects, and technical experiments.
